name: colgrep
description: Semantic code search for your terminal. Combines regex filtering with semantic ranking. All local — your code never leaves your machine.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install colgrep: brew install lightonai/tap/colgrep or use the shell installer (https://github.com/lightonai/next-plaid/releases)

commands.description: Build the search index for a project (or current directory)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install colgrep: brew install lightonai/tap/colgrep or use the shell installer

args.name: path
args.description: Project path to index (default: current directory)

commands.description: Clear the search index for the active model (or all models)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install colgrep: brew install lightonai/tap/colgrep or use the shell installer

args.name: --all
args.description: Wipe every index across all models

commands.description: Semantic code search with optional regex filtering

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install colgrep: brew install lightonai/tap/colgrep or use the shell installer

args.name: -e
args.description: Regex pattern for pre-filtering before semantic ranking

commands.description: Persist a ColBERT-style model as the default

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install colgrep: brew install lightonai/tap/colgrep or use the shell installer

commands.description: Show which model an index was built with
